title: Opendoor Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Financial Results
text: Opendoor reported full year 2024 revenue of $5.2 billion, a 26% decrease from 2023. The company recorded a net loss of $392 million for the year. However, Adjusted EBITDA improved significantly from $(627) million in 2023 to $(142) million in 2024, reflecting enhanced operational efficiency and cost optimization efforts. Opendoor sold a total of 13,593 homes in 2024, down 27% compared to the previous year. In Q4 2024, Contribution Profit was $38 million versus $30 million in Q4 2023 and $52 million in Q3 2024. Contribution Margin was 3.5% in Q4, versus 3.4% in Q4 2023 and 3.8% in Q3 2024. Adjusted EBITDA was $(49) million versus $(69) million in Q4 2023 and $(38) million in Q3 2024. Adjusted EBITDA Margin was (4.5)% versus (7.9)% in Q4 2023 and (2.8)% in Q3 2024. Adjusted Net Loss was $(77) million versus $(97) million in Q4 2023 and $(70) million in Q3 2024. The company ended the year with $2.2 billion in net inventory, up 22% year-over-year, and maintained $1.1 billion in total capital including $679 million in unrestricted cash.
